final:
module dram_cell(  
    input clk,  
    input write_en,  
    input read_en,  
    input [3:0] data_in,  
    output reg [3:0] data_out  
);  
    reg [3:0] memory;  
    
    always @(posedge clk) begin
  if (write_en) begin memory <= data_in ; end
  end

  always @(posedge clk) begin
  if (read_en) begin data_out <= memory ; end
  end  
endmodule
